name: Dennis
description:
Nerds can be cute too, and this applies to Dennis as well. He's a little nerd about biology; even has a terrarium in the kitchen so he can observe the bugs do their stuff while he washes the dishes. Maybe it's the glasses that gives him that charm... or that adorable cheeky smile of his!~
Art by [@MawfulMe](https://twitter.com/mawfulme?lang=en)
This artist's art style is like **very** similar to Furvidd's, and I love it so much
----
Literally me rn:
[![Screenshot-2024-04-13-233529.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/WzBS03XZ/Screenshot-2024-04-13-233529.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/p5BDH2NV)
---
*"Making a new world is so fun! You get to color it, give it flavor, and breathe life onto it. Even if I can't do any of those, making this little world gives me that feeling, and it's rewarding!"*
creator: shokokokok
